exam.entryDescription: 20 questions, 20 minutes, no feedback until the end.
exam.title: Exam mode
exam.description: 20 questions drawn from every module, 20 minutes on the clock and no feedback until the end — just like the real thing. Pass mark: 15 of 20.
exam.failed: Not passed. Review your errors below — they have been added to your review list.

review.title: Mistake review
review.description: The questions you missed in quizzes and exams. Answer each one correctly to clear it.
review.empty: Nothing to review — no pending mistakes. New ones will appear here automatically.
review.keep: Still pending — it will come back.
review.done: All mistakes cleared. Great study session!
